transit.header:
[7] service is suspended in both directions while we address a signal problem near 74 St-Broadway.

Take Q66 buses for service between 74 St-Broadway and Main St.
transit.description:
Planned Work Reminder:
There is no [7] service between 74 St-Broadway, Queens, and 34 St-Hudson Yards, Manhattan in either direction.

LIRR is cross-honoring subway riders between Queens and Manhattan at Flushing, Mets-Willets Point, Woodside, Grand Central Madison, and Penn Stations.
